description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a vibrant yellow background and bold purple accents, designed to catch attention. The front features a large, explosive 'BIG ENERGY SHOCK!' logo in red and black, with the word 'FRUITY' prominently displayed below in a purple band. The lower section of the can displays a colorful illustration of various fruits, suggesting a mixed fruit flavor. The top of the can is metallic with a standard pull tab opening. The back and sides of the can are covered with detailed product information, including a barcode, nutritional facts, and branding elements. The overall appearance is energetic and modern, suitable for urban environments like convenience stores, parks, or vending machines.
description: A tall, yellow and purple energy juice can with bold branding and fruit illustrations, featuring a metallic pull tab top and detailed product information on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'BIG ENERGY SHOCK!' logo, 'FRUITY' label, and a vibrant fruit illustration at the bottom.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the continuation of the yellow and purple design, with the start of the nutritional information panel and more branding text.
description_view_2: The back view displays the full nutritional information panel, barcode, and additional product details on a yellow background.
description_view_3: This angled view highlights the side of the can, showing part of the 'SHOCK!' logo and a vertical label with more product information.
